description: Universal calcDetail() helper function that renders standardized calculation detail cards, plus integration into core modules (cable sizing, voltage drop, short-circuit, kritisk audit).
steps: Create calcDetail(calc) function that accepts a structured calculation object and returns an HTML string with <details> expandable cards
The calc object structure: { name, formula, variables: [{name, symbol, value, unit, source}], substitution, steps: [{desc, expr, result}], result: {value, unit}, reference }
Output format: formula name header, symbolic formula, variable table, numeric substitution line, intermediate steps, final result with unit, and reference clause
Integrate calcDetail() into cable sizing (officialIz, derating chain Iz = Iz_tab*Ca*Cg*Ci)
Integrate calcDetail() into voltage drop (deltaU% formula)
Integrate calcDetail() into short-circuit (Ik3max, Ik1min, ZT calculations)
Integrate calcDetail() into kritisk audit findings (show full substitution for each finding)
Add tests verifying calcDetail() produces correct HTML output
Add tests verifying the integration returns proper detail cards for each module
acceptance_criteria: calcDetail() function exists and is generic/reusable
Produces <details> expandable HTML with formula, variables table, substitution, steps, result, reference
Cable sizing module shows full derating calculation details
Voltage drop module shows full deltaU% calculation details
Short-circuit module shows full Ik3/Ik1/ZT calculation details
Kritisk audit shows full calculation substitution for each finding
New tests verify calcDetail() output format and module integration
Click-only interface maintained (no text inputs introduced)
verification: calcDetail() output contains <details>, <summary>, variable tables, and formula substitutions
